005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
009
010import com.ctre.phoenix6.swerve.SwerveRequest;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Gains.Swerve.Alignment;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
014import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.booleans.BStream;
015import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.booleans.filters.BDebounceRC;
016import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
017import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
018import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
019import java.util.function.Supplier;
020
021public class SwerveDriveSetAlignment extends Command {
022
023    protected static final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve;
024
025    protected final BStream isAligned;
026
027    private Supplier<Pose2d> pose;
028
029    protected SwerveDriveSetAlignment(Supplier<Pose2d> pose) {
030        this.isAligned = BStream.create(this::isAligned)
031                .filtered(
032                        new BDebounceRC.Both(
033                                Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Tolerances.ALIGNMENT_DEBOUNCE.in(Seconds)));
034        this.pose = pose;
035        addRequirements(swerve);
036    }
037
038    static {
039        swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
040    }
041
042    public Rotation2d getTargetAngle() {
043        Pose2d currentPose = swerve.getPose();
044        double atan = Math.atan2(pose.get().getY() - currentPose.getY(), pose.get().getX() - currentPose.getX());
045        return new Rotation2d((atan));
046    }
047
048    private boolean isAligned() {
049        return Math.abs(swerve.getPose().getRotation().minus(getTargetAngle())
050                .getDegrees()) < Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Tolerances.THETA_TOLERANCE.getDegrees();
051    }
052
053    @Override
054    public boolean isFinished() {
055        return isAligned.get();
056    }
057
058    @Override
059    public void execute() {
060        SwerveRequest request = new SwerveRequest.FieldCentricFacingAngle()
061                .withTargetDirection(getTargetAngle())
062                .withVelocityX(0)
063                .withVelocityY(0)
064                .withHeadingPID(Alignment.akP, Alignment.akI, Alignment.akD);
065        swerve.setControl(request);
066    }
067}
